sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: PNC는 2026년 1분기 FirstBank 인수 완료와 함께 순이익 18억 달러, 조정 EPS 4.32달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 순이익은 18억 달러를 기록했으며, 조정 희석 EPS는 4.32달러로 집계되었습니다.
FirstBank 인수를 성공적으로 완료하였으며, 이를 통해 평균 대출과 예금이 각각 7%와 4% 증가하는 성장을 보였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 1월 5일 FirstBank 인수를 완료하여 1분기 실적에 반영하였으며, 이와 관련된 통합 비용이 비이자 비용 증가의 주요 원인이 되었습니다.
평균 대출 잔액이 230억 달러 증가하며 7% 성장했고, 평균 예금 잔액은 188억 달러 증가하며 4% 성장했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 순이자이익(NII)은 39억 6,100만 달러로 전 분기 대비 증가했으며, 순이자마진(NIM)은 2.95%를 기록했습니다.
분기 중 약 7억 달러 규모의 자사주 매입을 실행했습니다.

watchItems.text: FirstBank 인수 이후 통합 비용이 향후 분기별 비이자 비용 및 효율성 지표에 미치는 영향 지속 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q12026financialhighlightsa.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 PNC Reports First Quarter 2026 Net Income of $1.8 Billion, $4.13 Diluted EPS or $4.32 as Adjusted NII increased 6%, NIM of 2.95%; grew average loans 7%; ~$700 million of share repurchases PITTSBURGH, Apr. 15, 2026 – The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) today reported: For the quarter In millions, except per share data and as noted 1Q26 4Q25 1Q25 First Quarter Highlights ▪ Financial Results Comparisons reflect 1Q26 vs. 4Q25 Net interest income (NII) $ 3,961 $ 3,731 $ 3,476 Income Statement ▪ First quarter results include FirstBank operations since acquisition close on Jan. 5th 2026 ▪ Adjusted EP  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.8 Billion = 18억 달러; $700 million = 7억 달러; $98 million = 9,800만 달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $4.13 = 4.13달러; $4.32 = 4.32달러; $700 = 700달러; $3,961 = 3,961달러; $3,476 = 3,476달러; 3,476 million = 34억 7,600만 달러; $98 = 98달러; $125 = 125달러; 3,961 million = 39억 6,100만 달러; 3,731 million = 37억 3,100만 달러.

on ▪ Noninterest expense increased 5% primarily due to FirstBank operating and integration expenses. Excluding integration expenses, noninterest expense increased 2% ▪ Balance Sheet ▪ Average loans increased $23.0 billion, or 7%, driven by loans acquired from FirstBank and commercial loan growth – Total loans increased $29.4 billion, or 9% ▪ Average deposits grew $18.8 billion, or 4%, driven by FirstBank deposits ▪ Net loan charge-offs were $253 million and included $45 million of acquired net loan charge-offs related to FirstBank loans. ▪ Main  Normalized numeric aliases: $23.0 billion = 230억 달러; $29.4 billion = 294억 달러; $18.8 billion = 188억 달러; $253 million = 2억 5,300만 달러; $45 million = 4,500만 달러; $1.4 billion = 14억 달러; $0.7 billion = 7억 달러; $23.0 = 23.0달러; $18.8 = 18.8달러; 2,079 million = 20억 7,900만 달러; 1,976 million = 19억 7,600만 달러; 2,204 million = 22억 400만 달러; 2,340 million = 23억 4,000만 달러; 6,165 million = 61억 6,500만 달러; 6,071 million = 60억 7,100만 달러; 5,452 million = 54억 5,200만 달러.

turn on average assets 1.19 1.40 1.09 Net interest margin (NIM) (non-GAAP) 2.95 2.84 2.78 Noninterest income to total revenue 36 39 36 Efficiency 61 59 62 Efficiency excluding integration costs (non-GAAP) 60 59 62 Common equity tier 1 (CET1) capital ratio 10.1 10.6 10.6 See non-GAAP financial measures in the Consolidated Financial Highlights accompanying this release. Totals may not sum due to rounding. From Bill Demchak, PNC Chairman and Chief Executive Officer: “2026 is off to a great start for PNC. During the first quarter we successfully closed the FirstBank acquisition, and in addition, generated strong legacy loan growth. Client activity remains robust across all our geographies, and importantly, we’re well positioned to continue our strong momentum.” - more - PNC Reports First Quarter 2026 Net Income of $1.8 Billion, $4.13 Diluted EPS or $4.32 As Adjusted – Page 2 Acquisition of F  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.8 Billion = 18억 달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $4.13 = 4.13달러; $4.32 = 4.32달러.
